Title: Microsoft-NVIDIA collaborate on AI for nuclear
Description:
Microsoft and NVIDIA are collaborating to accelerate the deployment of commercially scalable, next-generation nuclear power by leveraging AI, cloud, and simulation technologies. Their solutions aim to make nuclear energy safer, more efficient, and accessible, supporting rapid electrification, regulatory compliance, and the mass manufacturing of nuclear plants to address global energy needs.

Learn more here: Sustainable Energy Solutions | Microsoft AI: https://msft.it/6054QssTE

#MicrosoftEnergy
Author: Microsoft Cloud
